query: SELECT ag.id as groupId, ag.name as groupName, ag.menuItemId, ag.minSelections, ag.maxSelections, ag.displayOrder, ao.id as optionId, ao.name as optionName, ao.price FROM menu_addon_groups ag LEFT JOIN menu_addon_options ao ON ao.addon_group_id = ag.id LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON ag.menuItemId = mi.id WHERE mi.name LIKE '%past%' OR mi.name LIKE '%Past%' ORDER BY ag.displayOrder, ao.id;
